comment: Named map-backed IOperationRequest returned by IOperationRequest.create(), flowing through the pipeline as @0 and resolved by name. Shipped here (not via @Reflected) because the AOT processor mis-generates descriptors for its generic arg(ArgKey<T>,T) method. GraalVM auto-discovers this file under META-INF/native-image, so a native consumer needs no hand-written reflect-config.
name: com.garganttua.api.commons.service.MapBackedOperationRequest
